mapper.select: SELECT c.cart_id AS cartId, c.user_id AS userId, c.product_id AS productId, p.product_name AS productName, p.product_image_url AS productImageUrl, p.price AS price, c.quantity AS quantity, p.price * c.quantity AS totalPrice FROM carts c INNER JOIN products p ON c.product_id = p.product_id WHERE c.user_id = #{userId} AND p.use_yn = 'Y' ORDER BY c.cart_id DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO carts ( user_id, product_id, quantity, created_at ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{productId}, #{quantity}, NOW() )
